reason: test.sh oracle is broken: it only runs PASS-TO-PASS tests (test_settings_importable, test_python_syntax_valid, etc.) and never runs any FAIL-TO-PASS tests (test_html_s3_path_removed, test_s3_report_bucket_exists_in_settings, etc.). This gives nop_reward=1 instead of 0, since all pass-to-pass tests pass on the base commit. The oracle cannot discriminate base from fixed. instruction.md changes have no effect on test outcomes — this is a test infrastructure problem requiring test.sh rewrite to include fail_to_pass tests.
